calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Martin Goodman, Esq. 415-397-7956 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Petitioner Hanson Bridgett LLP's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. Even were the court to treat to the answer filed by respondent Philip Achilles as a timely rejection of the arbitration award, Mr. Achilles failed to satisfy his burden per Business and Professions Code section 6204(a) that his failure to appear at the arbitration hearing was not willful. Mr. Attridge's email and the declarations of Mr. Achilles and Mr. Attridge show that Mr. Achilles knowingly chose not to attend the arbitration because he did not believe that it would have any utility. That is willful non-appearance per section 6204(a).

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
